stage: Supabase-backed Maxim portal consuming canonical public resolved-selector availability
notes: The portal authenticates through the Supabase maxim-portal Edge Function using a temporary shared access code exchanged for an eight-hour random session token. The access code is not present in the page or repository. BLS and Heartsaver selectors now consume the exact selector-resolved-availability.v1 artifacts and shared projection/time-selection library used by the production public scheduler; no independent resolver or schedule_future eligibility filtering remains in Maxim. Registration requests are revalidated against that same canonical selector artifact before Supabase persistence. Google Voice group chat remains a disabled shell.
